shellCommands.command: /bin/bash -lc "pwd && rg --files -g '"'!node_modules'"' -g '"'!dist'"' -g '"'!build'"' | head -80 && printf '\\n--- package files ---\\n' && rg --files -g 'package.json' -g 'astro.config.*' -g 'next.config.*' -g 'vite.config.*' -g 'svelte.config.*' -g 'nuxt.config.*' -g 'src/**' | head -120"
/bin/bash -lc "printf '%s\\n' '--- app files ---' && for f in app/page.tsx app/layout.tsx app/Recommendations.tsx app/ProductList.tsx; do echo \"--- "'$f ---"; sed -n '"'1,260p' \""'$f"; done'

/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,220p' tsconfig.json && printf '\\n--- changed files ---\\n' && find . -maxdepth 2 -type f -newermt '2 minutes ago' -not -path './node_modules/*' -not -path './.next/*' -print"

errors: `--dangerously-bypass-hook-trust` is enabled. Enabled hooks may run without review for this invocation.
